summary.key_theme: 公司透過與 CrowdStrike 合作推出 AI 驅動的網路安全解決方案，獲得分析師調升目標價，市場對其技術突破與成長動能持樂觀態度。

bullish.title: Viavi Solutions shares are trading higher after the company announced its Observer Threat Forensics solution with an advanced retrospective analysis capability. Also, Rosenblatt maintained its Buy rating on the stock and raised its price target from $27 to $42.
bullish.category: 產品發布與分析師評級
bullish.reason: 此新聞涵蓋了產品技術突破與券商調升目標價兩大關鍵利多，Rosenblatt 分析師 Mike Genovese 將目標價大幅調升至 $42，顯示對其 AI 網路安全策略的高度信心。

bullish.title: VIAVI Solutions Inc (VIAV) Shows Strong Growth Momentum and Technical Setup for Potential Breakout
bullish.reason: 技術面分析指出該股展現強勁的成長動能與潛在的突破型態，為投資人提供正向的技術面支撐。

bullish.title: Why Is Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Stock Soaring Today
bullish.reason: 報導解釋了股價飆升的背後原因，主要歸功於新產品發布帶來的市場正面情緒與買盤湧入。

bullish.title: How Investors May Respond To Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Expanding AI-Driven Network Security And Sensing Portfolio
bullish.reason: 探討投資人對公司擴大 AI 驅動網路安全與感測產品組合的反應，長期來看有助於提升公司估值。

bearish.title: D.R. Horton, Viavi Solutions, and ATI Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
bearish.reason: 報導指出股價出現短期回調，可能與市場獲利了結或整體板塊波動有關，但未提及公司基本面惡化。

neutral.title: Assessing Viavi Solutions (VIAV) Valuation After New AI Data Center And Fiber Test Product Launches
neutral.reason: 針對新產品發布後的估值進行中性評估，提供投資人理性分析視角，未給予明確買賣建議。

neutral.title: Is Viavi Solutions (VIAV) an Underappreciated Stock?
neutral.reason: 探討該股是否被市場低估，屬於觀點型文章，對短期股價影響有限。
